final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: e-commerce landing page hero section mockup
Asset type: UI/UX web design mockup, beauty/skincare brand
Primary request: clean, bright, airy feminine landing page hero section with floral accents and purple flowers
Scene/backdrop: soft gradient background with subtle purple floral decorations, plenty of white space
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum, soft pink and white color palette
Style/medium: modern web UI mockup, clean minimalist design, soft lighting
Composition/framing: full-width hero section layout, left column for text content, center for model, right column for product display and stat cards, 3 benefit cards at bottom
Lighting/mood: bright and airy, soft diffused lighting, welcoming and feminine atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink, white, purple floral accents, gold accents on stat cards
Materials/textures: smooth UI elements, pill-shaped feature badges, rounded white rectangles with subtle shadows
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: maintain clean layout with proper hierarchy, keep all Japanese text legible and properly positioned, ensure feminine aesthetic with soft pink and purple floral theme
Avoid: cluttered layout, hard shadows, dark moody lighting, masculine or aggressive styling, pixelated or blurry text
